text:
Correction Status Code CHAR 1 This column contains the correction status code indicating the status of the assessment: current (C), modified (M) or inactivated (X). C=Current Assessment
I=Inactivation Requested
M=Modified by a Subsequent Submission
X=Inactivated by a Subsequent Submission
10 ORGNL_ASMT_ID ORGNL_ASMT_ID Encrypted Original Assessment ID NUM 12 This column contains the unique ID of the assessment where the Correction Number is equal to '00'.
11 V0100F_PRIOR_STF_MOOD_SCRE_NUM
